feed.title: Emily J. Herron
feed.subtitle: A simple, whitespace theme for academics. Based on [*folio](https://github.com/bogoli/-folio) design.

entry.title: Some Information on This Site
entry.content:
The Purpose

This site will serve as my professional website. I am going to keep it updated with my current research information.

The Blog

The blog will not be updated frequently. It will be used to provide information about any news concerning me, any professional events I attend, etc.

The Technology

The site is developed using Jekyll, is hosted using github pages, and uses this template as a starting point.
entry.summary: The Purpose This site will serve as my professional website. I am going to keep it updated with my current research information.
